description: Native English (American Midwest, Michigan). Male, 60s. High quality, clean. Persona: Flint repair tradesman. Emotion: flat, attentive, dry. Low, dry baritone with a flat working-class Michigan vowel and almost no melody. Deliberate, economical pacing; short declarative fragments spoken as if his hands are busy, with the silences left to stand.
text: [deliberate] Hold the light steady... Nothing runs on its own. It only looks easy because somebody's stood here keeping it from quitting. [serious] You stop showing up... and the water stops. That's the whole trade.
